/usr/bin/c++    -rdynamic CMakeFiles/robot_hw_test.dir/test/robot_hw_test.cpp.o  -o /home/milenavi/project_ws/devel/lib/hardware_interface/robot_hw_test   -L/home/milenavi/project_ws/build/gtest  -Wl,-rpath,/home/milenavi/project_ws/build/gtest:/home/milenavi/project_ws/build/gtest/lib:/opt/ros/noetic/lib ../../../gtest/lib/libgtest.so /opt/ros/noetic/lib/librosconsole.so /opt/ros/noetic/lib/librosconsole_log4cxx.so /opt/ros/noetic/lib/librosconsole_backend_interface.so -llog4cxx /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libboost_regex.so.1.71.0 /opt/ros/noetic/lib/librostime.so /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libboost_date_time.so.1.71.0 /opt/ros/noetic/lib/libcpp_common.so /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libboost_system.so.1.71.0 /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libboost_thread.so.1.71.0 /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libconsole_bridge.so.0.4 -lpthread
